title: Giantex Portable Washing Machine, Full Automatic Washer and Dryer Combo, with Built-in Pump Drain 8 LBS Capacity Compact Laundry Washer Spinner for Apartment RV Dorm

control_failure:
Purchased this machine for a small prewar apartment without a laundry room. This machine was pretty good while it lasted - easy to hook up to the sink faucet, surprisingly big capacity, wash cycles less than an hour. It was noisy, but a rolling stand so it's not sitting on the ground would help (unfortunately I couldn't fit one in the space where this needed to go).

It is a nice little workhorse. Your clothes get really clean, you can hardly hear it when working. Very happy after a month of use.

UPDATE AUG 29,2019

The dream is over and the nightmare has just begun. The little washing machine stopped working two weeks ago and after several attempts to communicate (via email) with the manufacturer, they just don't reply. I want to know if
Broke one month after owning it, trash.

I like this little washing machine, except the short host and it doesn't have softener receptacle. But it works well only for only 6 months!!! I contact the seller couple times, but they never responded. Very bad customer service and poor quality! This is the worst product I bought in Amazon!
leak: Broke aftwr a year. Tub became seperated from its carriage or whatever and water would leak out the sides. They didn't want it back or anything so that shows you they know how crappy it is. Good thing I got an EXTRA warranty from Amazon
Flooded the house repeatedly. Stopped working all together after 2 months. DO NOT BUY

I did like this machine, although you could never use the "high" level water option, medium was enough for it to start splashing out and over etc.  But after 2 years it just sarong a very bad leak from the bottom, not from the basin but from within the machine, at the bottom, it was bad, luckily I was there and saw it.  Garbage, but I guess for the price what did I expect.
physical_breakage: After about three months my lid broke and has to be held open to load which gets annoying . It recently started shaking so bag it jumps around 🤦🏻‍♀️😩

Poor design. It worked great for a month or 2 but then the agitator plate stopped rotating due to very poor design. The metal insert is way too small and started tearing apart the plastic plate. Ive tried fixing it many different ways including using epoxy, but the motor is too strong and continues to tear apart the plastic agitator plate. Thinking of getting a different brand.

The plastic agitator plate stripped out within 6 months so the washer no longer agitated. I contacted the seller and looked at third parties- nobody sells replacement parts for this. Luckily I was able to fix it with a bit of JB Weld for plastic. Took a bit of finagling, but wasn’t too difficult to do. It agitates perfectly again.
motor_failure:
